creator: dmitry@karasik.eu.org
text:
On Wed, Dec 24, 2008 at 02:10:27PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/p5-Prima,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/129910 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129910
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Thank you,

The patch is approved

-- 
Sincerely,
	Dmitry Karasik
